task: Review the additional intra-stencil native immediate optimization: stencil_native_x64.lua now keeps single-use imm ConstI64/ConstI64Hole as imm32/imm32_hole for AddI64/SubI64 and emits add/sub r64, imm32 with abs32s reloc; native test patching now accepts abs32s imm. Check for semantic risks, especially hole-parametric correctness and non-ADDI users of ConstI64Hole. Do not modify files.
